name: openEuler sig-Edge SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-Edge SIG maintains 10 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Edge SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for Edge sig.. The SIG has 13 core members and maintains 10 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-Edge SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-Edge SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at sig-Edge@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-Edge SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Edge SIG maintains 10 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-Edge.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-Edge SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Edge SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Shouyong Liu, Xiaojing Xu, Fengtu Wang. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
